title: Mini Shimmer Watercolor Paint Set, 60 Colors Glitter Metallic Watercolour Painting Sets, Solid Pearl Water Color Paints for Artists, Amateur Hobbyists and Painting (60 Colours)
features: Pearl Watercolor Paint Set‌ - The GlisDyck professional ‌watercolor kit‌ features 60/108 vibrant colors with intense shimmer mineral pigments, Includes 2 brushes and 3 sinks. Metallic watercolor blend effortlessly, offering glitter effect on light/dark surfaces,Ideal for ‌watercolor sets‌ for adults &kids, the smooth formula dries quickly without clumping or flaking

Beginner Friendly - Designed for all skill levels, the Glisdyck watercolors feature easy water activation, smooth brushstrokes, and excellent coverage on both light and dark surfaces, the many colors shimmer effect helps newcomers achieve flawless gradients and details effortlessly

Thoughtful & Portable Gifted Packaging‌ - Each color pan sits securely in individual slots within a sturdy, travel-friendly case, preventing spills and damage; The compact design includes two wood brushes and three sinksfor on-the-go creativity;Organized layout lets you quickly locate colors, and Lid packaging box keeps pigments clean longer，which is an excellent gift choice for painting lovers

Superior Shimmer & Long-lasting Effects - Stand out with dazzling metallic finishes and multidimensional pearl effects- The Glisdyck high-shine watercolor paint create striking contrasts and luminous layers, adding depth to artworks. Unlike alternatives, these colors maintain intense sparkle even after drying, with no dullness or patchiness. Perfect for adding highlights, textures, or fantasy touches to illustrations, greeting cards, and decorative projects

Safe & Multipurpose Formula‌ - Crafted with natural mica powder, gum arabic, the Glisdyck watercolors paint set are safe for kids and adults;use them for watercolor painting, epoxy resin, card making, or staining of velvet flower ,DIY crafts etc
Note:This set of single color is a 1ml mini set. It is hand-dripped, and some individual pigments may overflow. Because of the baking process, some colors may be concave, which is normal.
description: Product Description Pearlescent watercolors look fantastic on colored backgrounds. Unlike traditional watercolors, the mica particles in pearlescent watercolors possess covering power. This allows them to produce a brilliant shimmering effect even on dark backgrounds. GlisDyck Shimmer Watercolor Paint Set Color Variety: Choose the set that best suits your needs. Safe Materials: Premium mica particles and natural gum arabic. Stable Formula：An optimal ratio achieves the most stable results. This maintains a good balance between easy solubility and ensuring the artwork does not fade or lose powder. It can be mixed with traditional watercolors to achieve a wider range of colors. This paint set includes a dedicated area for mixing colors. Using pearlescent watercolors to outline contours or add accents on top of traditional watercolor works is also a great option.
